---
title: "PCA for mouse and pig"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

txi_mouse <- readRDS("txi_mouse.rds")
txi_pig   <- readRDS("txi_pig.rds")

metadata  <- read.csv("metadata_clean.csv")

prepare_metadata <- function(metadata, species_name) {
    
  # Filter to species
  meta_sp <- metadata %>% filter(species == species_name)
  
  # organ viability
  organ_counts <- meta_sp %>%
    group_by(organ_normalized, side) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(organ_normalized) %>%
    filter(n_distinct(side) == 2, all(n >= 3))
  
  if (nrow(organ_counts) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Filter to viable organs
  viable_organs <- unique(organ_counts$organ_normalized)
  meta_sp <- meta_sp %>% filter(organ_normalized %in% viable_organs)
  
  return(meta_sp)
}

meta_mouse <- prepare_metadata(metadata, "Mus_musculus")
meta_pig   <- prepare_metadata(metadata, "Sus_scrofa")

```

```{r}

run_pca_bgee <- function(organ_name, meta_sp, txi_data, species_name) {
  
  meta_org <- meta_sp %>% filter(organ_normalized == organ_name)
  samples  <- meta_org$libraryid
  
  if (nrow(meta_org) < 3) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(
    txi = list(
      counts              = txi_data$counts[, samples],
      abundance           = txi_data$abundance[, samples],
      length              = txi_data$length[, samples],
      countsFromAbundance = txi_data$countsFromAbundance
    ),
    colData = meta_org,
    design  = ~ 1
  )
  
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10
  dds  <- dds[keep, ]
  
  vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
  
  # Get PCA data
  pca_data    <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "side", returnData = TRUE)
  percent_var <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))
  
  # Join metadata 
  pca_data <- pca_data %>%
    left_join(
      meta_org %>% 
        dplyr::select(libraryid, 
                      side_meta = side,
                      sex, 
                      age_weeks,
                      experimentid, 
                      platformid, 
                      protocol, 
                      librarytype,
                      maxreadlength),
      by = c("name" = "libraryid")
    )
  
  base_plot <- function(color_var, title_suffix) {
    if (!color_var %in% colnames(pca_data)) return(NULL)
    if (length(unique(na.omit(pca_data[[color_var]]))) < 2) return(NULL)
    
    ggplot(pca_data, aes(PC1, PC2, color = as.factor(.data[[color_var]]))) +
      geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
      xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percent_var[1], "% variance")) +
      ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percent_var[2], "% variance")) +
      ggtitle(paste0(organ_name, " — ", title_suffix)) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            legend.text     = element_text(size = 7)) +
      labs(color = title_suffix)
  }
  
  p_side     <- base_plot("side_meta",   "Side (L/R)")
  p_sex      <- base_plot("sex",         "Sex")
  p_expt     <- base_plot("experimentid","Experiment")
  p_platform <- base_plot("platformid",  "Platform")
  p_protocol <- base_plot("protocol",    "Protocol")
  p_libtype  <- base_plot("librarytype", "Library Type")
  p_readlen   <- base_plot("maxreadlength","Read Length") 
  
  # Combine only non-null plots
  plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), 
                  list(p_side, p_sex, p_expt, p_platform, 
                       p_protocol, p_libtype, p_readlen)) 
  
  if (length(plots) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  combined <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
    plot_annotation(title = paste(species_name, "-", organ_name))
  
  return(combined)
}

# run all species

species_list <- list(
  list(name = "Mus_musculus", meta = meta_mouse, txi = txi_mouse),
  list(name = "Sus_scrofa",   meta = meta_pig,   txi = txi_pig)
)

pdf("pca_batch_check_bgee.pdf", width = 12, height = 10)

for (sp in species_list) {
  for (org in unique(sp$meta$organ_normalized)) {
    p <- run_pca_bgee(org, sp$meta, sp$txi, sp$name)
    if (!is.null(p)) print(p)
  }
}

dev.off()

```
